column1: # Import conversations to test your agent.
# - 500 characters max per question, including spaces.
# conversationNumber - Identifies each conversation. All questions and responses with the same conversation number will run as a single test case against the agent.
# question - The user prompt that the agent will respond to.
# response - The reference agent reply. This field is optional. The agent response isn't compared to this reference answer.
# - Test methods are not included in this template. You can select them after importing the test cases.
# - By default, the 'General quality' test method is added to the imported test set.
# For more details, refer to the documentation: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=2335991

column2: I'm allergic to gluten. Do you have any pizza recommendations for me?
column3: Unfortunately we're not offering any gluten-free pizzas.

column2: Which pizza would you recommend for someone who loves meat?
What's the most popular pizza type right now?
What kind of pizzas do you recommend for vegetarians?
Can you suggest a pizza for someone who doesn't like spicy food?
column3: Margherita usually fits very well to people who don't like spicy food

column2: What are the top attractions to see in Rome
column3: The Colosseum, Roman Forum, Pantheon, Trevi Fountain, and Vatican City.

column2: What is the best area to explore for history in Rome?
column3: The Roman Forum and Palatine Hill are great for history lovers.

column2: Where should I go for art in Rome?
column3: Visit the Vatican Museums and the Sistine Chapel.

column2: Should I book dinner in advance in Rome?
column3: Booking is recommended for popular spots, especially on weekends

column2: Do I need to tip in Rome restaurants?
column3: Service is usually included; a small tip is optional.

column2: Is tap water safe to drink in Rome?
column3: Tap water is generally safe; you can also ask for bottled water.

column2: Do restaurants charge for bread or table service?
column3: Some places add a small service or bread charge; check the menu.
